meta.title: ReviewNudge · Coming Soon
meta.description: ReviewNudge is getting ready to help service businesses turn a job well done into an honest review with one thoughtful nudge and an optional follow-up.

hero.title: A thoughtful nudge for more honest reviews.
hero.body: ReviewNudge is getting ready to help local service teams ask at the right moment, follow up gently, and keep review requests organized without turning good customer relationships into awkward chores.
hero.offerBody: One clean workspace for customer nudges, review links, follow-ups, and status visibility.

earlyAccess.title: Be first in line.
earlyAccess.body: Leave your email and I’ll let you know when ReviewNudge is ready for founding customers.
earlyAccess.privacy: No spam. No noisy launch sequence. Just a heads-up when the doors open.
earlyAccess.assurance1: No cerdit card required for early access

updates.label: What is coming
updates.step1Title: Ask while the work is fresh
updates.step1Body: Send a review request right after a job is complete, while the customer still remembers the good experience.
updates.step2Body: Keep reminders gentle, visible, and organized so nobody has to rely on memory or sticky notes.
updates.step3Body: Track who is ready, who was nudged, who needs a reminder, and who already left feedback.

preview.title: The workflow stays simple on purpose.
preview.body: ReviewNudge is designed around the small operational moments that get missed: completed jobs, happy customers, pending asks, and the follow-up that should feel human instead of automated sludge.
preview.reminderBody: Friendly, short, and tied to the service visit.

footer.launch: ReviewNudge™ is preparing for launch. Add your email to the waitlist or check back here in a day or so.
